# nerdctl_volume (Data Source)

An existing named volume. Fails when absent.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "nerdctl_volume" "existing" {
  name = "app_config"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Volume name.

### Read-Only

- `labels` (Map of String) User labels on the volume.
- `mountpoint` (String) Directory on the host backing the volume.
